title: task
description: Zephyr lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/ only has coap_client.c. Python has full server (udp_server.py, resources.py), Rust has client.rs. Nodes need to respond to CoAP requests for sensor data, firmware updates, etc. Add server-side CoAP handling.
close_reason: Implemented CoAP server with callback-based resource handlers: /status, /config, /neighbors, /key, /msg/inbox. Uses Zephyr CoAP service APIs. Added Kconfig (LICHEN_COAP_SERVER) and CMakeLists.txt integration. Well-known/core handled by Zephyr's built-in support.
